summary: Phase 1 SpaceUI testing complete. All backend APIs working. Frontend UI renders correctly with strict black & white design. Fixed /spaceui.lua routing issue by adding /api/spaceui.lua endpoint.

minor.issue: Original /spaceui.lua path (outside /api) not accessible due to K8s ingress routing all non-/api paths to frontend. Fixed by adding /api/spaceui.lua alias endpoint.

action_items: SPEC DEVIATION: The spec required /spaceui.lua endpoint outside /api, but K8s ingress routes all non-/api paths to frontend. Changed to /api/spaceui.lua which works. Main agent should confirm this is acceptable or find alternative solution.
test_credentials: N/A - No auth required for Phase 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 complete. Backend endpoints: /api/health (200, {status:'ok', service:'spaceui'}), /api/spaceui.lua (200, text/plain, CORS *). Frontend: Home page with hero, loadstring code block, 3 feature cards, footer. Stub pages at /getting-started, /components, /examples with Phase 3 badge. Copy button works with clipboard API. Mobile responsive. Strict black & white design verified.

backend: GET /api/spaceui.lua returns 200 with Content-Type text/plain; charset=utf-8
GET /api/spaceui.lua body contains placeholder comment and return {}
frontend: Home page loads with navbar (logo 'SpaceUI', links Docs/Components/Examples/GitHub)
Hero subtitle 'A minimalist Roblox UI Kit' renders
Tagline badge 'v1.0 · Built for Roblox devs' displays
Loadstring code block shows full URL with /api/spaceui.lua
Copy button changes to 'Copied' state on click with checkmark
'Read the docs' ghost button present and navigates to /getting-started
'Browse components' primary button present and navigates to /components
Features grid with 3 cards (Fluent API, Config System, Black & White)
Stub pages render with 'Phase 3' badge, gradient heading, 'Coming in Phase 3' text, 'Back to home' button
Mobile responsive (390x844) - hero scales, navbar clean
